subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards God! It is abundantly clear and manifest that divine favors have been complete in relation to all creation, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد مقبل این بسی معلوم و واضحست که الطاف الهیه نسبت ببریه کامل بوده و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @presence of; reunion with God
